message:
fix(store): emit keyspace notifications for immediate-delete and expire-set paths in expire_key

- Add notify_keyspace_event("del") when expire_key receives a
  non-positive milliseconds value and removes the key immediately —
  previously immediate deletion via EXPIRE 0 or PEXPIRE 0 would not
  emit any keyspace notification
- Add notify_keyspace_event("expire") when a positive TTL is
  successfully set on a key, matching Redis behavior where setting
  an expiry emits an "expire" notification to keyspace subscribers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
